data.title: Microservices Architecture
data.description: Instagram uses a microservices architecture to compartmentalize functionalities and improve scalability.
data.technical_spec: Utilizes containerization (Docker) and orchestration tools (Kubernetes) to manage microservices.

data.title: Distributed Databases
data.description: Stores data across distributed databases for redundancy and fast access.
data.technical_spec: Employs NoSQL databases like Cassandra for high availability and SQL databases for relational data.

data.title: CDN Integration
data.description: Content Delivery Network integration for faster multimedia content delivery.
data.technical_spec: Utilizes global CDN services such as Akamai for reducing latency.

data.title: Load Balancing
data.description: Efficient load balancing to manage high traffic and ensure server reliability.
data.technical_spec: Implements Layer 7 load balancers that handle HTTP traffic.

data.title: API Gateway
data.description: Centralized API gateway to handle routing, authentication, and monitoring of API requests.
data.technical_spec: Uses GraphQL for flexible data queries and client interactions.
